topics: Steps in Digital Image Processing - Components - Elements of Visual Perception - simple image formation model. Relationships between pixels - Colour image fundamentals - RGB
Review of matrix theory: row and column ordering- Toeplitz
Spatial domain methods: point processing- intensity transformations
histogram processing. Spatial filtering- smoothing filters
sharpening filters. Frequency domain methods: low pass filtering
Unconstraint restoration and constraint restoration. Inverse filtering
Weiner filtering. Image Compression: Need for compression
Basics of lossless compression and lossy compression. Concept of transform coding
Region Split & Merge. Segmentation based on thresholding. Edge based segmentation-edge detection
